heading: Definitions
label: 2571 Definitions
notes: References in TextChapter 2 of part I of title 5, referred to in par. (3), probably means chapter 1 of part I of title 5, which is classified to section 101 et seq. of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, and which relates to organization of agencies.

children.heading: Agreement
children.label: 1 Agreement
children.text: The term “Agreement” means the Agreement on Technical Barriers to Trade referred to in .section 3511(d)(5) of this title

children.heading: Conformity assessment procedure
children.label: 2 Conformity assessment procedure
children.text: The term “conformity assessment procedure” means any procedure used, directly or indirectly, to determine that relevant requirements in technical regulations or standards are fulfilled.

children.label: A
children.text: Any executive department.

children.label: B
children.text: Any military department.

children.label: C
children.text: Any Government corporation.

children.label: D
children.text: Any Government-controlled corporation.

children.label: E
children.text: Any independent establishment.

children.heading: International conformity assessment procedure
children.label: 4 International conformity assessment procedure
children.text: The term “international conformity assessment procedure” means a conformity assessment procedure that is adopted by an international standards organization.

children.heading: International standard
children.label: 5 International standard
children.text: The term “international standard” means any standard that is promulgated by an international standards organization.

children.label: A
children.text: the membership of which is open to representatives, whether public or private, of the United States and at least all Members; and

children.label: B
children.text: that is engaged in international standards-related activities.

children.heading: International standards-related activity
children.label: 7 International standards-related activity
children.text: The term “international standards-related activity” means the negotiation, development, or promulgation of, or any amendment or change to, an international standard, or an international conformity assessment procedure, or both.

children.heading: Member
children.label: 8 Member
children.text: The term “Member” means a WTO member as defined in .section 3501(10) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: any individual who is a citizen or national of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: any corporation, partnership, association, or other legal entity organized or existing under the law of any State, whether for profit or not for profit.

children.heading: Product
children.label: 10 Product
children.text: The term “product” means any natural or manufactured item.

children.heading: Secretary concerned
children.label: 11 Secretary concerned
children.text: The term “Secretary concerned” means the Secretary of Commerce with respect to functions under this subchapter relating to non­agricultural products, and the Secretary of Agriculture with respect to functions under this subchapter relating to agricultural products.

children.heading: Trade Representative
children.label: 12 Trade Representative
children.text: The term “Trade Representative” means the United States Trade Representative.

children.heading: Standard
children.label: 13 Standard
children.text: The term “standard” means a document approved by a recognized body, that provides, for common and repeated use, rules, guidelines, or characteristics for products or related processes and production methods, with which compliance is not mandatory. Such term may also include or deal exclusively with terminology, symbols, packaging, marking, or labeling requirements as they apply to a product, process, or production method.

children.heading: Standards-related activity
children.label: 14 Standards-related activity
children.text: The term “standards-related activity” means the development, adoption, or application of any standard, technical regulation, or conformity assessment procedure.

children.heading: State
children.label: 15 State
children.text: The term “State” means any of the several States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam and any other Commonwealth, territory, or possession of the United States.

children.heading: State agency
children.label: 16 State agency
children.text: The term “State agency” means any department, agency, or other instrumentality of the government of any State or of any political subdivision of any State.

children.heading: Technical regulation
children.label: 17 Technical regulation
children.text: The term “technical regulation” means a document which lays down product characteristics or their related processes and production methods, including the applicable administrative provisions, with which compliance is mandatory. Such term may also include or deal exclusively with terminology, symbols, packaging, marking, or labeling requirements as they apply to a product, process, or production method.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 18 United States
children.text: The term “United States”, when used in a geographical context, means all States.
